description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service and a single build stage. Define a hidden .build job template that runs in the build stage and executes the command `docker build --build-arg=coq_image=\"coqorg/${CI_JOB_NAME}\" --pull -t demo .`. Add three concrete jobs named coq:8.10, coq:8.11, and coq:dev that extend the .build template, inheriting the script and stage, so each builds a Docker image using the corresponding Coq version via the CI_JOB_NAME variable. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
